scenarios.name: Optimistic-update mutation for creating a todo with rollback on error
scenarios.rationale: Baseline manages local useState for optimistic UI; treatment uses useMutation with onMutate calling cancelQueries + getQueryData snapshot + setQueryData, returns { previous } for onError rollback, and invalidateQueries on onSettled.

scenarios.name: Cursor-based infinite-scroll feed
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reimplements pagination with useState + manual cursor; treatment uses useInfiniteQuery with initialPageParam, getNextPageParam consuming lastPage.nextCursor, and renders data.pages with hasNextPage / isFetchingNextPage gating the load-more button.
